partial_reasons: Page 2 is fixture-mode: only 1 of 10 AgentRole tokens (MarketMaker) appears; the fixture displays ProofAgent/LibrarianAgent/MarketMakerAgent rather than the canonical role taxonomy (Solver/Verifier/Challenger/...). This is a known limitation: agents page is W1-era materialized view, not Phase-6.1 ChainTape live data.
agent_001 (deployed by setup) not present in fixture data — also a known limitation: /api/agents serves a static fixture, not the workspace registry.
